name: FLORIDA GOLF PERFORMANCE CENTER
about: The Florida Golf Performance Center is a dedicated training facility in Sarasota, Florida, focused on golf instruction, club fitting, and player development. The center operates in partnership with the Suncoast Golf Center, offering an air-conditioned studio equipped with advanced technology including Trackman, Sam Putt Lab, and video analysis. PGA Professional Terry Hanson leads all operations, providing lessons for players of all skill levels with expertise in both on-course coaching and technical club fitting. The center specializes in a structured lesson system with various packages and also serves as the official training center for the West Florida Golf Tour, preparing young professionals for competition.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman technology for detailed ball and club analysis
Expert instruction from a PGA Fellow with European Tour coaching experience
Comprehensive club fitting services with Taylor Made National Fitter certification
Partnership with West Florida Golf Tour for elite player development

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor used for lessons and fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The center provides club fitting services and can supply clubs for lessons. Participants are welcome to bring their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, but the facility doesn't appear to prohibit bringing your own.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The center is focused on training and fitting rather than full simulation play, so 18-hole times aren't specified.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The center welcomes juniors and youth as part of their target audience, offering programs for young players.
